action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Vining, Roe, Stubbs, Hong, Emerson, Arney, Brown, Clancy, Goodwin, Hysell, Madison, Phelps, Rivera-Wagner, Tenorio, DeSanto, DeSmidt, Joers, Kaufert, Mayadev, Miresse, Moore Omokunde, Prado, Snodgrass, Stroud, Subeck, Taylor, Udell and McCarville; 
cosponsored by Senators L. Johnson, Roys, Drake, Larson, Carpenter, Dassler-Alfheim, Hesselbein, Ratcliff and Spreitzer
